preprocessing_steps.Description: 100 Hz sampling rate, epoched from -190 ms to +800 ms around stimulus

TaskDescription: Visual oddball P300 (target 'OOO' vs non-target 'XXX', target ratio 0.2) performed while walking on a treadmill at 1.6 m/s to pose an ambulatory BCI problem. Trial duration: 1.0s.
Description: BCI Competition 2020 Track 5: P300 oddball ERP detection during walking at 1.6 m/s with simultaneous scalp-EEG, ear-EEG, EOG and forehead IMU recording.
